name: Kalakaua
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain syrup from pineapple, leaving the slices in the can.
2. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water and pour into the can.
3. Chill for at least 3 hours.
4. To unmold, place the can in hot water, cut out the bottom (placing a saucer or your hand under the open end), and remove the other end while pushing the mold out.
